description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow for style and syntax checks that runs on every pull request. The workflow should have two jobs: one for clang-format checks using an ubuntu-latest environment with Python 3.x, and another for codespell checks also on ubuntu-latest. The clang-format job should check out submodules, install clang-format-13, and run a style check script. The codespell job should check out the repository without submodules and run codespell with specified skips and ignore words.
